LADEN ABOUT 13.25 KNOTS ON ABT 18.75 MTS VLSFO + 1.74 MT LSMGO
 
 
AT SEA CONSUMPTION ECO: (WOG)
BALLAST ABOUT 12 KNOTS ON ABT 14.00 MTS VLSFO + 1.74 MT LSMGO 
LADEN ABOUT 12 KNOTS ON ABOUT 15.70 MTS VLSFO + 1.74 MT LSMGO
 
 
IN PORT CONSUMPTION:
AT PORT MOORING OR LOADING OR DISCHARING BASIS TWO A/E + BOILER:
AT PORT WORKING, 1.5 MT VLSFO + 3.0 MT LSMGO
IDLE, ONE A/E + BOILER: 1 MT VLSFO + 1.5 MT LSMGO
 
 
SULPHUR CONTENT - VLSFO, ISO 8217/2017, LSMGO (DMA) MAX 0.1 PCT SULPHUR
CONTENT ISO 8217/2017
 
ALL DETAILS ABOUT AND GIVEN IN GOOD FAITH ANY SAVING IN CONSUMPTION MUST BE
OFF-SET AGAINST ANY SPEED UNDERPERFORMANCE, ANY SAVING IN TIME MUST BE
OFF-SET AGAINST ANY EXCESS CONSUMPTION, ANY SAVING IN FO MUST BE OFF-SET
AGAINST INCREASED MDO AND VICE VERSA, AND ANY OVERALL SAVING ON INDIVIDUAL
PASSAGE(S) MUST BE SET OFF AGAINST AN OVERALL LOSS ON OTHER INDIVIDUAL
PASSAGE(S).
SPEED/CONSUMPTION FIGURES BASIS SUMMER DRAFT, UNDER GOOD WEATHER CONDITIONS
ON UNRESTRICTED PASSAGE NOT EXCEEDING BEAUFORT FORCE 4 AND/OR DOUGLAS SEA
STATE 3
 
IT IS EXPLICITY UNDERSTOOD AND AGREED THAT NO WARRANTY APPLIES WHILST
SAILING IN RESTRICTED AREAS A/O I/O PORTS/CANALS/RIVERS, MANOEUVERING, PILOT
TO PILOT, SAILING IN BAD WEATHER AND/OR IN NARROW/SHALLOW WATERS WHEN THE
VESSEL MAY CONSUMES MDO IN MAIN ENGINE. CONSUMPTION MAY INCREASE DURING
BALLASTING/DEBALLASTING/BALLAST EXCHANGE OPERATION AT PORT/SEA.
'ABOUT' ON SPEED MEANS 0.5 KNOT ALLOWANCE AND 'ABOUT' ON BUNKERS CONSUMPTION
MEANS 5% ALLOWANCE ON THE DESCRIBED DAILY BUNKER CONSUMPTION.
 
SPEED/CONSUMPTION UNDERPERFORMANCE CLAIM CAN ONLY BE SUBMITTED IN RESPECT OF
PERIODS DURING WHICH THE VESSEL ENCOUNTERS WEATHER UPTO BEAUFORT 4 AND/OR
DOUGLAS SEASTATE 3 (SIGNIFICANT WAVE UP TO 1.25 M MAX) AND/OR NO ADVERSE
CURRENT AND/OR NO NEGATIVE INFLUENCE OF SWELL WITH A MINIMUM STEAMING OF
ATLEAST 24 CONSECUTIVE HOURS.
 
VESSEL'S CRANES NOT TO BE OPERATED BY CREW BUT INSTEAD TO BE OPERATED BY
QUALIFIED AND PROPERLY CERTIFIED SHORE PERSONNEL EMPLOYED AND PAID FOR BY
CHARTERERS AND CRANE OPERATION ALWAYS AT CHARTERERS ENTIRE RISK,
RESPONSIBILITY AND EXPENSE WHO ARE TO FOLLOW OPERATING INSTRUCTIONS STRICTLY
AS PER MANUFACTURERS OPERATING MANUALS.
 
CHARTERERS TO HAVE THE OPTION TO HAVE THE VESSEL RUN ON ECO SPEED AND
CONSUMPTION AS DESCRIBED BY OWNERS. WHEN CHARTERERS ORDER THE VESSEL TORUN
ON ECO SPEED, THIS SHALL CONSTITUTE COMPLIANCE WITH, AND THERE SHALL BE NO
BREACH OF, ANY OBLIGATION REQUIRING THE VESSEL TO PROCEED WITH UTMOSTAND/OR
DUE DESPATCH OR ANY OTHER SUCH SIMILAR/EQUIVALENT EXPRESSION. VESSEL/OWNERS
ARE NOT TO BE RESPONSIBLE FOR ANY CLAIMS RELATED TO VESSELS SPEED AND/OR
BUNKER CONSUMPTION DURING ANY PERIODS WHERE THE VESSEL HAS BEEN REQUESTED TO
PROCEED AT ECO SPEED.
